description: Aysanabee is a multi-instrumentalist, producer and singer-songwriter currently based in Toronto. He is Oji-Cree, Sucker Clan of the Sandy Lake First Nation, a remote fly-in community in the far reaches of Northwestern Ontario. In a short amount of time, three singles were released including “Ego Death” and “Nomads”, which charted on Billboard Canada and became #1 on CBC Music and went #1 on Alternative Radio, making Aysanabee the first Indigenous artist to reach #1 on any Mediabase chart. His album Watin was shortlisted for the Polaris Music Prize in 2023. Aysanabee’s latest EP, Here and Now, moves in a new direction, towards his own experiences of love’s end and his process of unflinching self-examination.
subtitle: Canada/ON
title: Aysanabee Concert
